name: conduit-ndi-capacitor
description: Conduit NDI output host (Capacitor iOS): publishes the program as an NDI network source (Resolume Arena / OBS list it like a camera). Frames arrive from the webview over a localhost frame socket (the native-camera transport reversed) and feed the Vizrt NDI SDK's sender. The SDK is a licensed local install — run scripts/make-xcframework.sh once per machine.
